value.content: RA-MoE is a routing-aware sparse MoE architecture that cuts p99 decode latency by 38% on a 47B model by biasing routing toward communication-efficient experts.
HA-Retrieve is a two-stage encoder for million-token documents that improves recall@10 by 17 points over BGE-large by routing top-32 sentence windows through a cross-encoder.

Polyglot-Switch is a 12K-utterance benchmark for intra-utterance code-switching across nine language pairs, finding that switch-token accuracy correlates more with BPE vocabulary overlap than model size.
AdaSpec dynamically tunes speculative decoding draft length per request, achieving 2.7x end-to-end speedup on Llama-3 70B with no quality regression.
The Tokenizer-Equity Index (TEI) measures cross-lingual tokenizer fairness across 104 languages; a targeted 8K-merge vocabulary patch recovers 92% of the latency gap for low-resource languages.
Trace-Critic Distillation trains 1B-parameter students on quality-filtered teacher traces, matching 8B accuracy at 9% inference cost on a 12-task reasoning suite.
Listwise-Aligned BGE distills reranker ordering into a bi-encoder with a listwise loss, removing the cross-encoder at inference while matching nDCG@10 within 0.6 points.
Activation steering vectors reduce successful prompt-injection rates from 41% to 7% on Mistral-7B-Instruct with under 0.3% MMLU impact and no retraining.
Pivot-based LLM data synthesis with a round-trip consistency filter improves BLEU on FLORES-200 by 6.3 points across 22 low-resource languages.
VCC pairs constitutional clauses with programmatic verifiers, improving clause adherence by 23 points and reducing critique-revision cycles from 4.1 to 1.6.

Papers on inference acceleration and retrieval efficiency: RA-MoE reduces MoE decode latency through routing-aware expert selection; AdaSpec adaptively controls speculative decoding draft length; Listwise-Aligned BGE removes the reranker bottleneck by distilling its ranking signal. All three papers target reducing query-time compute without sacrificing quality.

Papers on multilingual and low-resource NLP: Polyglot-Switch benchmarks code-switching, the Tokenizer-Equity Index quantifies fertility disparities across 104 languages, and synthetic pivot-data generation boosts low-resource MT on FLORES-200. Together they address the systematic under-representation of non-English languages in standard NLP pipelines.

Papers on long-context retrieval and model alignment: HA-Retrieve handles million-token documents through hierarchical attention; Trace-Critic Distillation produces reasoning-capable small models; activation steering vectors defend against prompt injection; VCC grounds constitutional AI with programmatic verifiers. The cluster spans retrieval, distillation, and safety — all centred on making LLMs reliable in high-stakes settings.
